exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your teenage parenting forward
items: Research and compile a list of 5 local resources for teenage parents (support groups, parenting classes, or teen parent programs)
Create a comprehensive list of your rights and responsibilities as a teenage parent in your state
Schedule and attend a preconception or prenatal appointment to discuss your health history and create a care plan
Interview and select a trusted adult mentor or advocate to help navigate important decisions throughout your parenting journey
Research and document your educational options including alternative programs, online schools, and childcare support available at your current school
Create a detailed monthly budget that includes all baby-related expenses such as diapers, formula, clothing, medical costs, and childcare
